content.situation: 你的同事夸你今天的演讲非常清晰有条理，你希望礼貌回应并表达感谢，同时稍微谦虚一点。
content.speakerText: Your presentation was so clear and well-structured—I really learned something today.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的演讲非常清晰有条理，我今天真的学到了东西。
content.responseTemplate: Thanks! I'm still getting better at organizing my thoughts, ___

options: and I didn't even prepare well.
so you must be bored now.

content.hint: 回应赞美时，先感谢，再轻描淡写提到自己还在进步，避免否定自己。
content.knowledgePoint: 得体回应赞美 + 谦虚表达

content.situation: 朋友夸你今天穿的衣服很适合你，你希望用温暖的方式回应，并回赞对方的品味。
content.speakerText: That color looks amazing on you—you have such great taste!
content.speakerTextCn: 这个颜色穿在你身上太棒了，你的品味真好！
content.responseTemplate: Thank you! I actually got the idea from ___

blanks.answer: how you always style your outfits.
options: how you always style your outfits.
the store where I bought it.
my mom, she hates this color.
I just grabbed whatever was clean.

content.hint: 回赞对方是让对话自然延续的好方法，避免只说‘谢谢’或否定自己。
content.knowledgePoint: 回应赞美 + 回赞对方

content.situation: 你的老师夸你作业写得非常有创意，你希望表达感谢，同时让语气轻松自然，不显得太正式。
content.speakerText: This assignment was so creative—I haven't seen a submission like this in weeks!
content.speakerTextCn: 这份作业太有创意了！我好几个星期没看到这么特别的作业了！

blanks.answer: I just tried to have fun with it.
options: I just tried to have fun with it.
I copied it from the internet.
I didn't even know what to write.
You're just being nice to me.

content.hint: 用轻松的语气说明你的动机，避免自贬或过度谦虚，保持自然。
content.knowledgePoint: 轻松回应赞美 + 非正式表达
